title: Bihar Police Constable Final Result 2025 for 19838 Post
description: CSBC Bihar Police Constable Advt no 01/2025 Final Result 2025 Post Update Date: 25-11-2025 Short Details: Bihar Police Constable PET Admit Card 2025: CSBC Bihar Police Constable Admit Card 2025 has been released on official website @https://csbc.bih.nic.in/ and Bihar Police Constable PET Exam Start on 15/12/2025 for 19838 Post whose, candidates who applied for the job of Bihar Police Constable Recruitment 2025 can download their admit card.
